retrieved_result: What are the most romantic lodges in the Northeast? Q: What are the most romantic lodges in the Northeast? I want to take my girlfriend to a romantic, outdoorsy winter lodge in the Northeast. Any suggestions? Greg Melville Nov 15, 2011A: These winter retreats combine just the right mix of ambiance and adventure–though they vary in luxury. Telemark In
Decision_Reason: The result concerns romantic lodges and travel, not DIY room decoration ideas; content is not relevant to the query.
